_comment: Per-model bone-role overrides for rig.js (tier 4), keyed by model URL (the same key as profiles.json). Most models need NO entry — the VRM/name/geometry tiers resolve them. Add one only when a specific rig is mis-identified. Shape per URL: { "roles": { "left_arm": "ExactBoneName", ... }  FORCES a role, beating vrm/name/geometry; "exclude": ["BoneName", ...]  blocks a bone from ever holding a role; "spring": { "extra": ["BoneName"], "never": ["BoneName"] }  force/suppress dangly-bone physics; "face": { "mouthMorph": <int> }  PINS the mouth-open morph INDEX (use only when a model's morphs are UNNAMED and the geometric jaw-drop detector picks wrong; must be a non-negative integer in range) }. A future mis-identified rig is a 1-line fix here — no code or regex changes.
